justification: All pass criteria met: off-by-one correctly identified (1-indexed API with 0-indexed formula giving page*pageSize instead of (page-1)*pageSize), correct fix stated as (page-1)*pageSize, severity is Critical (exceeds Important threshold), safe_to_deploy is false, and input validation gap (page<1, negative offset, zero pageSize) noted as a secondary finding.

observations.text: Off-by-one root cause precisely identified with clear reproduction steps showing page=1 yields offset=10 instead of 0
Exact fix provided: const offset = (page - 1) * pageSize
Input validation secondary finding covers page<=0, negative offsets, and unbounded pageSize
Excellent additional findings: SELECT * data leakage, OFFSET scalability, missing pagination metadata
Backward compatibility note about existing callers who may have worked around the bug by sending page=0 shows strong production awareness
Confidence level 97 is well-calibrated for a deterministic, provable bug
